title: Testbook is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Testbook is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
